title: Verify widget displays correct state for different trial statuses
description: Test widget behavior across all trial states: active, paused, cancelled
preconditions: Multiple test accounts with different trial states

steps.description: 1. Test with active trial account - verify 'trial active' widget variant
2. Test with paused trial account - verify 'paused' widget variant
3. Test with cancelled trial account - verify 'cancelled' widget variant

expected_result: Each trial state shows appropriate widget variant with correct styling and messaging
